info.description: KiwiFS is a content-addressable file system with an API.
info.title: KiwiFS API

get.description: Retrieve system-wide analytics, including document health, coverage, engagement metrics, and top updated pages. Requires SQLite search backend.

parameters.description: Directory path prefix to filter statistics
parameters.name: scope

parameters.description: Number of days since update to consider a page stale (default: 30)
parameters.name: stale_threshold

500.description: Internal server error while building stats

501.description: Analytics not implemented for non-SQLite backends

get.description: Identifies missing documentation or search gaps by listing queries that returned zero results. Requires SQLite search backend.

parameters.description: Maximum number of content gaps to return (default: 20)
parameters.name: limit

501.description: Analytics v2 not implemented for non-SQLite backends

post.description: Dismisses or hides a specific failed search query from the content gaps listing. Requires SQLite search backend.

501.description: Analytics v2 not implemented for non-SQLite backends

get.description: Retrieve the top failed search queries within a specified timeframe. Requires SQLite search backend.

parameters.description: Maximum number of failed queries to return (default: 20)
parameters.name: top

parameters.description: Retrieve stats since this Unix timestamp or RFC3339 date
parameters.name: since

501.description: Failed search analytics not implemented for non-SQLite backends

get.description: Retrieve high-level analytics overview metrics (total page views, total search queries, search success rate, unique pages viewed) and their delta percentages compared to the previous period. Requires SQLite search backend.

500.description: Internal server error while loading overview stats

501.description: Analytics v2 not implemented for non-SQLite backends

get.description: Retrieve detailed search analytics including time-series search success rates and top failed search terms. Requires SQLite search backend.
get.summary: Get search success and queries analysis

501.description: Analytics v2 not implemented for non-SQLite backends

get.description: Returns a breakdown of page views by source connector type. Requires SQLite search backend.

501.description: Analytics v2 not implemented for non-SQLite backends

get.description: Lists the trending and declining pages in the wiki based on traffic delta. Requires SQLite search backend.

501.description: Analytics v2 not implemented for non-SQLite backends

get.description: Retrieve page view statistics for pages in the wiki database. Requires SQLite search backend.

parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return (default: 20)
parameters.name: top

parameters.description: Specific page path to filter stats
parameters.name: path

parameters.description: Retrieve stats since this Unix timestamp or RFC3339 date
parameters.name: since

501.description: Page view analytics not implemented for non-SQLite backends

get.description: Retrieve detailed page view statistics including time-series data and top pages in the wiki database. Requires SQLite search backend.
get.summary: Get page view time-series and top pages

parameters.description: Specific page path to filter views
parameters.name: path

500.description: Internal server error querying page views

501.description: Analytics v2 not implemented for non-SQLite backends

post.description: Uploads an image, video, audio, or PDF asset file to the specified directory.

parameters.description: Subdirectory path to upload the asset into (e.g. 'images')
parameters.name: path

get.description: Returns historical audit logs since a specific RFC3339 timestamp (defaults to last 24h) up to a limit (defaults to 100, max 10000).

parameters.description: Optional RFC3339 timestamp to filter audit logs from
parameters.name: since

parameters.description: Optional limit on maximum returned entries (default 100, max 10000)
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Returns a list of files that link to the specified file.

parameters.description: Path of the file (must start with '/')
parameters.name: path

get.description: Retrieves the status of the repository backup and synchronization process, if enabled.
Returns line-by-line git blame information for the specified file.

parameters.description: Path of the file (must start with '/')
parameters.name: path

post.description: Writes multiple files in a single transaction/operation.

parameters.description: Bulk write request payload containing list of files, actor, and commit message
parameters.name: body

parameters.description: Provenance metadata header applied to all files if present
parameters.name: X-Provenance

get.description: Reads a canvas file and returns its JSON content if structurally valid.

parameters.description: Path to canvas file (must end with .canvas.json)
parameters.name: path

400.description: Invalid query parameters or file type

500.description: Internal server error reading file or invalid canvas JSON structure

put.description: Creates or updates a canvas file after validating its structure against the JSON Canvas specification.

parameters.description: Path to canvas file (must end with .canvas.json)
parameters.name: path

400.description: Invalid parameters or invalid canvas JSON structure

delete.description: Removes a canvas file by path.

parameters.description: Path to canvas file (must end with .canvas.json)
parameters.name: path

patch.description: Applies a batch of atomic node/edge operations (add, update, remove) to a canvas document.

parameters.description: Path to canvas file (must end with .canvas.json)
parameters.name: path

post.description: Repositions existing canvas nodes spatially using Graphviz layout engines.

parameters.description: Path to canvas file (must end with .canvas.json)
parameters.name: path

parameters.description: Actor identity performing the layout operation
parameters.name: X-Actor

post.description: Builds a spatially positioned JSON Canvas (.canvas.json) file based on wiki-links between pages in the knowledge graph.

parameters.description: Actor identity performing the generate operation
parameters.name: X-Actor

500.description: Internal server error generating or writing canvas

get.description: Searches and filters nodes and edges within a canvas file.

parameters.description: Path to canvas file (must end with .canvas.json)
parameters.name: path

parameters.description: Filter nodes by type (text, file, link, group)
parameters.name: type

parameters.description: Substring search match against fields (text, file, url, label)
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: Filter by node ID connected to other nodes/edges
parameters.name: connected

parameters.description: If true, omit edges from the result
parameters.name: nodes_only

parameters.description: If true, omit nodes from the result
parameters.name: edges_only

400.description: Invalid query parameters or file type

get.description: Returns a list of all canvas files (.canvas.json) in the knowledge base.
Returns a list of commit changes in the repository. Supports long polling for real-time updates.

parameters.description: Sequence (commit hash) to get changes since
parameters.name: since

parameters.description: Maximum number of changes to return (default 50, max 500)
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Acquires or extends an exclusive write lock lease for an actor on a file path. Returns 409 Conflict if already claimed by someone else.
post.summary: Claim a task lease on a file path

parameters.description: Claim details. lease_duration is optional (default is 30 minutes, min is 1 minute, max is 24 hours)
parameters.name: body

delete.description: Releases an exclusive write lock lease held by the actor on a file path.
delete.summary: Release a task lease on a file path

get.description: Returns a list of all active leases currently held in the system.

post.description: Downloads the content of a web page, parses it into markdown, writes it to a folder, and registers it in the system index.

400.description: Invalid JSON payload or missing URL

500.description: Clipping or write pipeline execution failed

get.description: Returns all inline comments (both active and resolved) attached to a specific file path.

parameters.description: File path to list comments for
parameters.name: path

post.description: Adds a new inline comment at a specific anchor position within a file path. Automatically commits the changes.
post.summary: Add a comment to a file

parameters.description: File path to add the comment to
parameters.name: path

delete.description: Deletes a specific inline comment by ID from a file path. Automatically commits the changes.

parameters.description: File path the comment is attached to
parameters.name: path

patch.description: Sets the resolution status (resolved or unresolved) of a specific inline comment by ID. Automatically commits the changes.

parameters.description: File path the comment is attached to
parameters.name: path

get.description: Reads and returns the contents of key workspace context markdown files: playbook.md, SCHEMA.md, index.md, and rules.md. If a file does not exist, an empty string is returned for its field.
Finds pages that contradict the content of the specified page.

parameters.description: Path of the file to check for contradictions (must start with '/')
parameters.name: path

get.description: Returns a standard diff for a file between two commit hashes/versions.

parameters.description: Path of the file (must start with '/')
parameters.name: path

get.description: Returns a list of all active draft branches.

post.description: Creates a new copy-on-write draft branch for editing.

409.description: Conflict if maximum active drafts limit is reached or repository is empty

get.description: Returns metadata for a specific draft by its ID.

delete.description: Deletes the draft branch and all its associated resources.

get.description: Returns the diff content between the draft branch and the main branch.
Reads a file's content from the draft's virtual copy-on-write storage.

parameters.description: Path of the file to read (must start with '/')
parameters.name: path

400.description: Path is required or access denied

404.description: Draft not found or file not found

put.description: Creates or updates a file in the draft's virtual copy-on-write storage.

parameters.description: Path of the file to write (must start with '/')
parameters.name: path

400.description: Path is required or failed to read body

delete.description: Deletes a file from the draft's virtual copy-on-write storage.

parameters.description: Path of the file to delete (must start with '/')
parameters.name: path

post.description: Merges the changes from the draft branch back into the main branch.

get.description: Returns the hierarchical directory tree from the draft's virtual storage starting from a specific path.

parameters.description: Directory path to start tree building from (defaults to '/')
parameters.name: path

get.description: Returns the stored vector embeddings and text chunks for a specified file path.

parameters.description: File path to get embeddings for
parameters.name: path

post.description: Runs search queries using both FTS5 and semantic search engines, and measures metrics (Hit Rate, MRR, Precision@5) against expected page paths.

parameters.description: Evaluation request containing questions and expected paths
parameters.name: body

get.description: Returns a Server-Sent Events (SSE) stream for real-time notifications about file changes and other events.
Exports files in the repository under a given path prefix, in JSONL, CSV, or Parquet format.

parameters.description: Path prefix of the files to export
parameters.name: path

parameters.description: Whether to include document vector embeddings
parameters.name: include_embeddings

parameters.description: Maximum number of documents to export (0 for unlimited)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of frontmatter fields to export
parameters.name: columns

post.description: Renders markdown files to a PDF, HTML page, slides presentation, or static website zip file.

get.description: Generates a JSON activity feed of recent changes in the knowledge base.

parameters.description: Filter events (e.g. 'published' to only show events for published pages)
parameters.name: filter

get.description: Generates an Atom XML activity feed of recent changes in the knowledge base.

parameters.description: Filter events (e.g. 'published' to only show events for published pages)
parameters.name: filter

get.description: Reads a file's content or metadata from the file system. Supports conditional GET using ETag/Last-Modified, link resolution, and metadata-only output.

parameters.description: Path of the file to read (must start with '/')
parameters.name: path

parameters.description: If true, returns only the Markdown frontmatter metadata as JSON
parameters.name: metadata_only

parameters.description: If true, resolves wiki-style links in markdown files
parameters.name: resolve_links

parameters.description: Referrer or source recording page views
parameters.name: source

parameters.description: ETag to check for caching (returns 304 Not Modified if matched)
parameters.name: If-None-Match

parameters.description: HTTP date to check for caching
parameters.name: If-Modified-Since

200.description: File content (raw bytes) or JSON metadata

put.description: Writes content to a file. If the Content-Type header is application/x-symlink, creates a symbolic link instead. Supports optimistic concurrency control.

parameters.description: Path of the file to write (must start with '/')
parameters.name: path

parameters.description: File content or symlink target path (max 32MB)
parameters.name: body

parameters.description: ETag to check for conflict (prevents update if the file changed)
parameters.name: If-Match

delete.description: Deletes a file from the repository.

parameters.description: Path of the file to delete (must start with '/')
parameters.name: path

post.description: Appends text/binary content to an existing file, separated by a separator.

parameters.description: Path of the file to append to (must start with '/')
parameters.name: path

parameters.description: Separator to insert before the appended content (default newline)
parameters.name: separator

get.description: Returns a graph of all nodes (files) and edges (links) in the workspace repository.
Computes and returns high-level graph metrics including total nodes, total edges, components count, top PageRank pages, and orphan pages.

parameters.description: Maximum number of top pages to return (default 20)
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Returns PageRank, In-Degree, Out-Degree, and betweenness centrality scores for all nodes/pages in the link graph.

parameters.description: Maximum number of pages to return (defaults to all)
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Computes and returns community clusters of pages in the link graph detected using the Louvain algorithm.
Computes and returns the shortest path of links between two specified pages in the link graph.

404.description: No path found or node not found

get.description: Walks the links graph from a page, returning outgoing links, incoming backlinks, directory/tag siblings, degree metrics, and page centrality/hub score.
get.summary: Perform a one-hop graph traversal from a page

get.description: Returns health, quality metrics, and issues list for a single page. Requires SQLite search backend.

parameters.description: Path of the page to inspect
parameters.name: path

501.description: Health check not implemented for non-SQLite backends

post.description: Runs an import job from a specified data source (builtin connectors like Postgres, SQLite, Notion, Markdown, etc., or Airbyte connectors).

400.description: Invalid request body or source configuration details

500.description: Internal server or import pipeline error

post.description: Validates the connection configuration by creating a temporary source on Airbyte Cloud.

200.description: Verification status (includes status, message, and temporary source_id)

400.description: Invalid request body, config, or workspace details

502.description: Airbyte Cloud API integration gateway error

503.description: Airbyte Cloud key is not configured

get.description: Returns a list of all configured connections on the active Airbyte Cloud workspace.

502.description: Airbyte Cloud API integration gateway error

503.description: Airbyte Cloud key is not configured

post.description: Discovers schema streams available for a specified source ID using the Airbyte Cloud API.

400.description: Invalid request body or missing source_id

502.description: Airbyte Cloud API integration gateway error

503.description: Airbyte Cloud key is not configured

post.description: Manually triggers a sync job for an existing connection configured on Airbyte Cloud.

200.description: Triggered sync job details (job ID, status, timestamps)

400.description: Invalid request body or missing connection_id

502.description: Airbyte Cloud API integration gateway error

503.description: Airbyte Cloud key is not configured

post.description: Validates the connection configuration against a local Docker-based Airbyte connector.

400.description: Invalid request body or missing config/image

post.description: Discovers and returns schema definitions (streams) available from a local Docker-based Airbyte connector.

400.description: Invalid request body or missing config/image

post.description: Retrieves the configuration specification schema for a local Docker-based Airbyte connector.

400.description: Invalid request body or missing connector image

503.description: Docker not available or Airbyte key missing

post.description: Lists available tables or collections for a given database data source (Firestore, Postgres, MySQL, MongoDB).

400.description: Invalid request body or connection error

get.description: Returns a list of all saved import connections (metadata only, no credentials stored).

post.description: Saves or updates import connection metadata (without credentials).

400.description: Invalid request body or missing 'from' field

delete.description: Removes a saved import connection configuration.

post.description: Triggers an import run using metadata from a saved connection. Connection credentials/API keys must be supplied in the request body as they are not stored.

400.description: Invalid request body or source configuration details

post.description: Pauses or resumes auto-sync for a connection, or changes its sync interval.
Fetches sample records from a source and returns rendered markdown previews of the documents.

400.description: Invalid request body or source configuration details

get.description: Returns a list of all supported built-in and Airbyte import sources, as well as server capabilities (whether Docker is available and if an Airbyte Cloud API key is configured).

200.description: JSON map listing builtin/airbyte sources and capabilities

get.description: Returns a list of all connections that have auto-sync enabled, showing their current sync status and errors if any.

post.description: Accepts a multipart file upload (CSV, JSON, JSONL, YAML, Excel, SQLite) and runs the import or preview pipeline on it.

parameters.description: Column/field name to use as primary key
parameters.name: id_column

parameters.description: Run mode ('import' to import files, 'preview' to return first 5 records)
parameters.name: mode

400.description: Invalid file, missing source type, or configuration error

500.description: Failed to copy file or run import

post.description: Ingests an external file (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, JPG, PNG, etc.) using MarkItDown, processes it (splitting, keyword extraction, etc.), and writes it to the knowledge base.

get.description: Runs or returns the cached result of a janitor scan over the workspace files to identify issues like stale files, orphans, broken links, etc.

parameters.description: Number of days after which a file is considered stale (defaults to system setting or 90)
parameters.name: staleDays

parameters.description: If true, bypasses the cached result and triggers a fresh scan
parameters.name: fresh

post.description: Validates markdown content for structural issues and returns a list of lint issues. Accepts either a file path to read from storage or inline markdown content directly.

parameters.description: Markdown file path or content to lint
parameters.name: request

404.description: File not found (when path is provided)

get.description: Returns a consolidation report summarizing episodic memory coverage across the knowledge base.

parameters.description: Override the default episodes path prefix
parameters.name: episodes_prefix

parameters.description: Limit the number of files returned
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Queries page metadata using filters, sorting, and pagination.

parameters.description: AND filters in the format 'field operator value' (e.g. 'tags contains project')
parameters.name: where

parameters.description: OR filters in the format 'field operator value'
parameters.name: or

parameters.description: Field to sort the results by
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Parses the markdown file at the given path to return metadata, title, YAML frontmatter, a text snippet, outgoing/incoming links, word count, and a list of headings.
get.summary: Get a lightweight summary of a file

get.description: Serves a file publicly if it is explicitly set to public, published, or if it inherits public access from a parent/sibling page.
Returns the tree hierarchy of all public/published documents.

parameters.description: Base path to build tree from (default /)
parameters.name: path

parameters.description: Filter ('published' to show only published pages)
parameters.name: filter

get.description: Retrieves the content of a file via a public share token. Requires X-Share-Password or password query parameter if password protected.

parameters.description: Optional password for password-protected shares via header
parameters.name: X-Share-Password

post.description: Sets published: true and sets/updates published_at in the page's markdown frontmatter. Writes changes to git repository.
Bulk-publishes multiple markdown pages in a single transaction/commit.

parameters.description: List of page paths to publish
parameters.name: body

get.description: Lists every page in the workspace that is currently published.
Returns the publishing metadata (is published, published time, public URL, views count) for a specific page.
get.summary: Get publish status of a page

parameters.description: Path of the page to check
parameters.name: path

get.description: Executes a Dataview Query Language (DQL) query over file metadata. Returns JSON by default, or formatted text when format is specified.
Computes aggregates (count, avg, sum, min, max) grouped by a frontmatter field, optionally filtered by path prefix and where expressions.

parameters.description: Field name to group results by
parameters.name: group_by

get.description: Returns the target path of a symbolic link.

parameters.description: Path of the symlink (must start with '/')
parameters.name: path

post.description: Renames a file from one path to another, optionally updating wiki links pointing to it in other files.

parameters.description: If true, automatically updates links to the renamed file (default true)
parameters.name: update_links

parameters.description: Rename request body containing source and target paths
parameters.name: body

post.description: Renames a directory and all files inside it.

parameters.description: Rename request body containing source and target directory paths
parameters.name: body

post.description: Resolves wiki-style links in the provided content body and returns the updated content.

get.description: Reads and returns the contents of the rules.md file. Supports formatting the rules for specific environments (e.g., cursor, claude, agents, openclaw) via the 'format' query parameter.

put.description: Writes the request body content to the rules.md file and commits it to the repository.

get.description: Lists all JSON schemas stored in the .kiwi/schemas directory by their type names.
Retrieves the JSON schema definition for a specific type name.

put.description: Creates or updates the JSON schema definition for a specific type name.

get.description: Performs a full-text search query on the repository content.

parameters.description: Maximum number of search results to return (default: 15, max: 200)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Number of search results to skip (offset) (default: 0)
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: Set to 'none' or 'off' to disable trust boosting in search results
parameters.name: boost

parameters.description: RFC3339 formatted cutoff date to filter search results by modification time
parameters.name: modifiedAfter

post.description: Performs a semantic/vector search using embeddings. Accepts query parameters or a JSON body.

parameters.description: JSON body containing query, topK, offset, and modifiedAfter filters
parameters.name: body

parameters.description: Search query string (used if not provided in JSON body)
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: Maximum number of search results to return (default: 10)
parameters.name: topK

parameters.description: Number of search results to skip (offset)
parameters.name: offset

get.description: Performs a verified full-text search query on the repository using the SQLite search backend.

parameters.description: Maximum number of search results to return (default: 15, max: 200)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Number of search results to skip (offset) (default: 0)
parameters.name: offset

get.description: Extracts a single section from a markdown file by heading text or section index.
get.summary: Read a single heading section from a file

parameters.description: Heading text of the section to extract
parameters.name: heading

parameters.description: Index of the section to extract
parameters.name: index

get.description: Returns all active share links associated with the specified file path.
get.summary: List share links for a path

parameters.description: File path to list share links for
parameters.name: path

post.description: Creates a password-protected or open public share link for a given file path.

delete.description: Deletes/revokes an active share link by its ID.

get.description: Returns metadata about the current workspace space, such as its visibility (private, unlisted, public) and its root directory path.

put.description: Changes the space's visibility setting. This is an admin-only endpoint.

get.description: Returns pages that have not been modified for a given number of days.

parameters.description: Number of days threshold for staleness (default 30)
parameters.name: days

get.description: Computes and returns potential links to other pages in the workspace using vector similarity search, excluding already linked pages.
get.summary: Get link suggestions for a file

parameters.description: File path to get suggestions for
parameters.name: path

parameters.description: Maximum number of suggestions to return (default 10)
parameters.name: limit

400.description: Path query parameter missing or invalid limit parameter

get.description: Retrieves the status of the repository backup and synchronization process, if enabled.
Reads the contents of a specific markdown template by name.
Lists markdown templates found in the .kiwi/templates directory.
Reads and returns the theme configuration from .kiwi/theme.json. Returns empty object if file does not exist.

put.description: Updates the theme configuration in .kiwi/theme.json. Maximum payload size is 64KB. Automatically commits the changes.

get.description: Returns a list of recent repository activity events (added, modified, deleted files) formatted as an activity timeline.

parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return (default 50, max 500)
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Returns a list of headings (ToC) for the specified file.
get.summary: Get table of contents for a file

parameters.description: Path of the file (must start with '/')
parameters.name: path

get.description: Returns the hierarchical directory tree starting from a specific path.

parameters.description: Directory path to start tree building from (defaults to '/')
parameters.name: path

get.description: Returns current UI configurations, including whether theme editing is locked.

post.description: Sets published: false in the page's markdown frontmatter. Preserves existing published_at if present. Writes changes to git repository.
Bulk-unpublishes multiple markdown pages in a single transaction/commit.

parameters.description: List of page paths to unpublish
parameters.name: body

get.description: Analyzes git log and repository changes to calculate page activity metrics including hot spots (frequently edited pages), cold spots (inactive pages), bursts (sudden spikes in activity), and single-author pages.

parameters.description: Maximum number of hot spots to return. Default 20.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Optional directory path prefix to filter pages.
parameters.name: path_prefix

get.description: Returns the file content at a specific version (commit hash).

parameters.description: Path of the file (must start with '/')
parameters.name: path

200.description: File content at the specified version

get.description: Returns a list of historical versions/commits for the specified file path.
get.summary: Get version log for a file

parameters.description: Path of the file (must start with '/')
parameters.name: path

post.description: Regenerates a dataview file by executing its queries if underlying data has changed.

parameters.description: File path of the dataview to refresh (if not in body)
parameters.name: path

get.description: Retrieves all view definitions, which include layouts and DQL query details.
Retrieves the configuration of a single view by its name.

put.description: Creates a new view or updates an existing view by name.

400.description: View name required or invalid request body

delete.description: Deletes a view definition by name.

get.description: Executes the query associated with the view using the dataview query engine, applying formulas to computed columns.

400.description: View name required or query evaluation error

get.description: Retrieves all currently registered webhooks.

post.description: Registers a new webhook listener that will receive HTTP POST callbacks when matching events occur.

delete.description: Removes a registered webhook by its ID.

post.description: Moves a page from its current workflow state to a target state, validating transitions and WIP limits.

409.description: Workflow mismatch, invalid transition, WIP limit reached, or concurrent modification conflict

post.description: Adds a page to a workflow state or moves it into a state column, updating the page's frontmatter.
post.summary: Assign page to a workflow state

get.description: Returns pages grouped by their workflow states.

post.description: Updates a card's ordinal position within its column.

get.description: Returns all workflow definitions loaded from `.kiwi/workflows/*.json`. Broken JSON files are reported in the `errors` field.
Returns a single workflow definition by name.

put.description: Creates or updates a workflow definition.

delete.description: Removes a workflow definition. Pages referencing the workflow are not automatically edited.

get.description: Returns simple health status
Returns health status with uptime and version
Returns Prometheus-formatted metrics
Serves a rendered HTML view of a published markdown page, or serves co-located static assets (images, PDFs) publicly if they inherit access from their parent pages.

parameters.description: Path to the published page or static asset
parameters.name: path

200.description: Rendered HTML content or raw asset binary content

get.description: Serves a raw file from the filesystem. Does not require authentication.
Returns readiness status including storage and protocol health
Serves the embedded React UI files (Javascript, CSS, images, etc.) from `ui/dist`. Falls back to index.html for client-side routing on other non-API requests.

200.description: HTML, JS, CSS, or image assets

excerpt.example: This is a snippet excerpt of the article...

snippet.example: This guide will help you set up and run KiwiFS in less than 5 minutes...

content.example: To install KiwiFS, run the following command...

snippet.example: A quick guide on starting with KiwiFS...

merged_from_refs.description: Cumulative merged-from entries seen across the tree (duplicates count).

password.description:
Password is accepted from API clients for convenience but is never
serialised back out — the server hashes it immediately.

wip_limit.description: max cards allowed in this column (0 = unlimited)

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer " followed by your API key.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
